SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearVsMidterm

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl.ViewRiksdagenElectionYearVsMidterm
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity public class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearVsMidterm extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
The Class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearVsMidterm. Database view for aggregate comparison of election years vs midterm years. Three-row summary: ELECTION_YEARS, MIDTERM_YEARS, COMPARISON_RATIO.
See Also:
